title: Horizontal Scroll Gallery
content: I received an interesting question recently. Another developer asked about horizontal scroll and different effects attached to it. He had a video concept for some gallery and I thought that it's worth it to create an example of something similar. It looks like Locomotive Scroll works strange inside of the CodePen's iframes. Sometimes it gets stuck. Iframes and custom scroll have always been a bad combination. But the whole demo is pretty nice. Feel free to use it for your experiments too.
